'''Colsassa''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Binary star/Legends|binary stars]] [[Adega Prime]] and [[Adega Besh]] in the [[Adega system/Legends|Adega system]].<ref name="TEA" /> Located in the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]] in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion<ref name="TEA Adega" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by eleven [[Moon/Legends|moons]]<ref name="TEA" /> collectively known as the [[Colsassan moons]].<ref name="FOTJ:A">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
